scoreFormula: manual human quality ratings from voice-quality-report.json (1-10 ratings mapped to 0-100 humanSpeechScore)

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.description: Best balanced options across accuracy, processing speed, and cost efficiency.

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.description: Middle options that miss Tier 1 but may have a specific accuracy, speed, or cost advantage.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: Lowest balanced options, generally weaker across the combined benchmark categories.

combinedLeaderboardPolicy: omitted: local and service providers are not ranked against each other
notes: Local human-quality scores were tied at 40.00 humanSpeechScore for all local Kitten models.
The cheapest cloud provider was `grok/grok-tts` at 0.2247¢ ($0.0022).
Manual human quality ratings supplied on 2026-05-21 were mapped from a 1-10 scale to 0-100 humanSpeechScore values.
